title: Learning English, Learning, English

vocabulary.meaning: all the words a person knows or uses
the skill of using your voice to communicate
the skill of understanding spoken language
able to speak a language easily and well

questions: What's the easiest/hardest thing about learning English?
How do you usually study? Do you have any special methods or techniques that you use?
Do you plan on achieving native-like fluency in English? How fluent is enough for you? Why?
What do you use English for in real life?
